lambda_functions.description: Lambda function for Core functionality for the AI agent
Lambda function for External system integration functionality

deployment_scripts.deploy.sh:
#!/bin/bash
# AutoNinja Agent Deployment Script
# Generated for: AutoNinja-Custom-Agent

set -e

echo "Starting deployment of AutoNinja-Custom-Agent..."

# Variables
AGENT_NAME="AutoNinja-Custom-Agent"
REGION="us-east-2"
ACCOUNT_ID=$(aws sts get-caller-identity --query Account --output text)

# Create IAM roles
echo "Creating IAM roles..."
aws iam create-role --role-name AmazonBedrockExecutionRoleForAgents_${AGENT_NAME} \
    --assume-role-policy-document file://trust-policy.json

# Attach policies
aws iam attach-role-policy --role-name AmazonBedrockExecutionRoleForAgents_${AGENT_NAME} \
    --policy-arn arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonBedrockFullAccess

# Deploy Lambda functions
echo "Deploying Lambda functions..."

# Deploy core-handler
zip -r core-handler.zip index.py
aws lambda create-function \
    --function-name agent-core-handler \
    --runtime python3.12 \
    --role arn:aws:iam::$ACCOUNT_ID:role/lambda-execution-role \
    --handler index.lambda_handler \
    --zip-file fileb://core-handler.zip

# Deploy integration-handler
zip -r integration-handler.zip index.py
aws lambda create-function \
    --function-name agent-integration-handler \
    --runtime python3.12 \
    --role arn:aws:iam::$ACCOUNT_ID:role/lambda-execution-role \
    --handler index.lambda_handler \
    --zip-file fileb://integration-handler.zip

# Create Bedrock Agent
echo "Creating Bedrock Agent..."
aws bedrock-agent create-agent \
    --agent-name "$AGENT_NAME" \
    --foundation-model "anthropic.claude-3-haiku-20240307-v1:0" \
    --instruction "You are a custom AI agent created by AutoNinja. You are designed to handle custom tasks as specified. Your key capabilities include: AI agent deployment, API access. Always be helpful, accurate, and follow best practices. If you're unsure about something, ask for clarification rather than making assumptions." \
    --agent-resource-role-arn "arn:aws:iam::$ACCOUNT_ID:role/AmazonBedrockExecutionRoleForAgents_${AGENT_NAME}"

echo "Deployment completed successfully!"
echo "Agent ARN: arn:aws:bedrock:$REGION:$ACCOUNT_ID:agent/$AGENT_NAME"
